node.text: James got a cool video card last week and is excited to use it for playing RPGs.

node.text: The game 'Witcher 3' inspired James to create his own game, pushing him to make something special.

node.text: James is working on a project to turn his childhood sketches of a main character into a computer game, combining his passions for gaming and storytelling.

node.text: James found the process of creating the game challenging, especially balancing mechanics and fairness.
